Class AbstractCommand

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.scripts.AbstractCommand
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProofScriptCommand
Direct Known Subclasses:
AssertCommand, AssumeCommand, AutoCommand, CutCommand, EchoCommand, FocusCommand, HideCommand, InstantiateCommand, JavascriptCommand, MacroCommand, RewriteCommand, RuleCommand, SaveInstCommand, SaveNewNameCommand, SchemaVarCommand, ScriptCommand, SelectCommand, SetCommand, SetEchoCommand, SetFailOnClosedCommand, SMTCommand, TryCloseCommand, UnhideCommand
@NullMarked public abstract class AbstractCommand extends Object implements ProofScriptCommand

A base class for ProofScriptCommands. This class brings automatically analyzes and meta-data of the given parameter class using reflection and decorators.

To implement your own command, you need to define two classes a POJO carrying the parameters, and child class of AbstractCommand. You need to override

invalid reference 
AbstractCommand#execute(Object)
to implement the

command logic.

      public List<ProofScriptArgument> getArguments()
      Description copied from interface: ProofScriptCommand
      Self-documentation of this command by returning a list of descriptions for arguments.

      getArguments in interface ProofScriptCommand
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of ProofScriptArgument

    • execute

      public final void execute(AbstractUserInterfaceControl uiControl, ScriptCommandAst args, EngineState stateMap) throws ScriptException, InterruptedException
      Specified by:
      execute in interface ProofScriptCommand
      Parameters:
      uiControl - the current ui controller
      args - the script arguments
      stateMap - the current state
      Throws:
      ScriptException - if something bad happens
      InterruptedException - if something bad happens

    • execute

      public void execute(ScriptCommandAst args) throws ScriptException, InterruptedException
      Executes the command logic with the given parameters args.
      Parameters:
      args - an instance of the parameters
      Throws:
      ScriptException - if something happened during execution
      InterruptedException - if thread was interrupted during execution
